title.en: If he had prepared more, it would have been eno...

content.en:
There are five eternal resources in the Void Ball of the Absolute Gate, which is a lot of them.

After all, the Peerless Gate itself has already refined a lot of eternal resources and condensed the Eternal Tribulation Body, and the other first-class invincible people of Crystal Gate also need eternal resources, but in the end, there are still five eternal resources left, which shows how many eternal resources Crystal Gate has.

From this, it can be imagined that there are too many eternal resources in the Star Ancient Domain.

This time he obtained five eternal resources, and Ye Tian only had one eternal resource left.

However, his goal could not be only an eternal resource, what if it was still missing?

After all, he was just estimating, not really sure that he only needed so many eternal resources, so it would not be wrong to prepare more eternal resources.

Moreover, in the future, if one's relatives have the hope of reaching the Supreme Realm, they also need eternal resources.

If he had prepared more, it would have been enough.

In order to prevent his duplicate body from falling, he left the Star Ancient Domain again and sent these five eternal resources to the hands of the main body.

Then, he returned to the Ancient Realm of the Stars.

......

The Ancient Domain of the Stars, the Ancient Star Clan will meet.

The ten Supreme Beings of the Ancient Star Clan have all come here, their strength is above the other supremes, and they are the true invincible existence of the Ancient Star Clan.

This time, the Ten Supreme Beings focused on one thing, that is, there have been many recent incidents of the Ancient Star Clan's first-class invincibles being killed, although the invasions were all small forces of the Ancient Star Clan, but the number of times was too frequent.

Moreover, they did not kill too many outside invincibles.

If this situation continues, the people of the Ancient Star Clan will fall into a panic, and it will cause more invincible people from the outside world to pour into the Star Ancient Domain, which is not a good thing for the Star Ancient Domain and the Ancient Star Clan.

"Gu Shen, tell me, what should we do now, we can't let the invincible people from the outside world invade like this, if we don't deter them, if there are countless invincible people from the outside world, we are afraid that we will be in trouble. "

The one who spoke was the East River, one of the ten supreme beings.

And Gu Shen is also one of the top ten supreme beings, and he is the general person in charge of blocking the invincible in the outside world.

Gu pondered for a while and spoke: "Once the invincible people in the outside world are hidden, it is difficult for us to detect them, and it is only at the moment when they make a move that they can be locked and blocked, but they are often half a step slower. Only some incapable or unlucky outsiders who happen to bump into the supreme beings of our clan can kill them. But this is not the solution, I propose to use the eternal source of the Zhen Clan, the Four Seas Mirror!"

"Use the Four Seas Mirror?"

The other supreme beings frowned one by one, as if they did not agree with it.

Donghe said: "Gu Shen, if you use the Four Seas Mirror to cover the entire Star Ancient Domain, it will sharply consume the origin of the Four Seas Mirror, and we need to maintain the Four Seas Mirror all the time, so as to lock the position of those outsiders, even if we kill all those invincible people in the outside world, but the origin of the Four Seas Mirror is afraid that most of it will be consumed, and it will fall into a deep sleep, so the loss will be great!"

Gu Shen said with a smile: "Actually, it's not too much of a loss, these invincible people in the outside world are relatively wealthy, even if they don't bring in many treasures, if you kill them all, you can make up for some losses, many resources in the outside world are not available in our Star Ancient Domain, and we can only plunder the resources of the outside world in this way." In addition, if we can intimidate the cultivators from the outside world, not many invincible people will enter the Star Ancient Domain, and we will be able to calm down for a long time. "

Immediately, the top ten supreme beings expressed their opinions one after another, and discussed this matter for a long time.

In the end, they decided to activate the Four Seas Mirror.

In an ancient temple of the Gu Xing Clan, Gu Shen and Donghe came here, and a black mirror tens of thousands of meters high was placed in the void here.

This black mirror is the Four Seas Mirror, an eternal source that belongs to the Ancient Star Clan.

Any Eternal Source has a special effect, and the special effect of the Four Seas Mirror is to monitor and lock.

Gu Shen personally urged the Four Seas Mirror, and soon the Four Seas Mirror released countless rays of light that slowly covered the entire Star Ancient Domain.

Bang!!!!!

The origin of the Four Seas Mirror was rapidly consumed, and an infinite and vast picture appeared on its mirror body.

Soon, the Four Seas Mirror locked onto the outsiders and revealed their locations.

"Donghe, you personally lead the team to kill these outsiders, and I will maintain the Four Seas Mirror here!" Gu Shen proposed.

"Good!"

Donghe nodded.

Wow!

The East River tore through the void and left.

Soon, one Supreme of the Ancient Star Clan was dispatched, and there was no Supreme among the outsiders, so the result was obvious.

Above an unknown star, a young brother is drinking wine with a beautiful woman of the ancient star clan in the restaurant.

Abrupt.

Brother Gongzi's figure was frozen, and the next moment his body shattered.

And at this time, his original aura emanated, and it turned out to be not the Gu Star Clan, but an invincible person from the outside world.

It's a pity that he hid it very well, and even changed his breath, but he couldn't hide it from the Sihai Mirror, and was locked by the Sihai Mirror, and a supreme person came here and wiped him out in an instant.

This scene was played out everywhere in the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and countless outsiders were bombarded and killed.

The Ancient Realm of Stars, among the stars.

A powerful first-class invincible person in the outside world is being hunted down by an ancient star clan supreme, if it weren't for his strong ability to save his life and the treasures given by his elders, he really couldn't escape.

Abrupt.

Another Supreme intercepted from the front.

"Damn, gotta leave!"

The invincible of the first class tore through a golden piece of paper, and the next moment a huge mouth swallowed him, and he disappeared into the outside world.

"That outsider has escaped, forget it, continue to hunt down the other invincible outsiders!"

The Supreme of the Ancient Star Clan said in a low voice.

--------------------------

"Anyone is watching me?"

Ye Tian's expression moved, and he felt that something was wrong.

In this case, it's like being locked by something.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, he had been discovered.

The next moment.

Bang!!!!

A Supreme One tore through the void, and as soon as he appeared, he directly used an invincible skill to kill him.

Obviously, the other party came prepared.

"Since it's exposed, it's not hidden!"

Ye Tian shattered the Void Supreme Technique with one blow and directly bombarded this Supreme Being, and even directly hit the other party with one blow.

The Supreme One was blown away by I don't know how many distances, his flesh was torn, and his internal organs were shattered, although it was not a major injury, but for a Supreme One, it was incredible to be injured by the Invincible in one blow.

After injuring this supreme being, Ye Tian's gaze looked at a large hall in the star where he was, this was the headquarters of the most powerful force in this star, and there must be eternal resources here.

Before, he wanted to slowly seek eternal resources, but now it was too late.

Then just grab it!
